subject: Re: Question
body:
I'm not sure it's safe long term or a good option to live in the US for a Trump/Pence presidency with Bannon as a key advisor.

Am I wrong? The hate, anti-semitism (swastikas painted all over the park a few blocks from me), and "His" desire to be Putin.... All super concerning.

Xx

Co-authored with iPhone auto-correct
